name: cap-raycast-extension
title: Cap
description: Control Cap recording and settings via Raycast.
author: Cap Software

commands.name: start-recording
commands.title: Start Recording
commands.description: Start a new recording in Cap.

commands.name: stop-recording
commands.title: Stop Recording
commands.description: Stop the current recording in Cap.

commands.name: pause-recording
commands.title: Pause Recording
commands.description: Pause the current recording in Cap.

commands.name: resume-recording
commands.title: Resume Recording
commands.description: Resume the current recording in Cap.

commands.name: switch-mic
commands.title: Switch Microphone
commands.description: Switch to a specific microphone by name.

commands.name: switch-camera
commands.title: Switch Camera
commands.description: Switch to a specific camera by ID.
